heroSubtitle: I build Flutter apps and Unity games
name: I'm Dhruv Mevada
title: Flutter & Unity Developer
tagline: App Developer with 1.5+ years of hands-on experience in Flutter and Unity technologies. Experienced in collaborating on projects from concept to deployment. Adept at learning new technologies quickly, solving problems and contributing to creative and technical solutions.
aboutDescription: I'm an App Developer with a 1.5+ of hands-on experience building cross-platform mobile apps in Flutter and interactive games in Unity. I've taken projects from concept through to publishing on the Play Store and App Store, and I enjoy picking up new technologies quickly to solve problems in creative ways.

projects.title: BattleGround Car
projects.description: Adventurous open-world game with different cars and maps, featuring a full player controller and minimap.

projects.title: Smart Bunny
projects.description: Kids learning game app with interactive UI and animations, packed with mini games that teach numbers and alphabets.

projects.title: Pre-built Games Suite
projects.description: Managed and shipped pre-built games including Cannon Colors, RotoMath, ColorTile Jump, and Puck Fight.

projects.title: RelaXiZ
projects.description: An app that says it's ok to be you — a calm space for mental wellness.

projects.title: My System
projects.description: A system for tracking daily quests and habits.

projects.title: My Diary & Your Voice
projects.description: A personal app for expressing yourself through writing and voice.

projects.title: Knotly & Portfolio App
projects.description: An app for building marriage biodata and resumes/portfolios.

projects.title: Strangers Stories
projects.description: Read or post unheard stories from strangers.

projects.title: Unsent Messages
projects.description: A personal space to say what's inside — messages you never sent.

projects.title: Woman Space
projects.description: A place to learn about the menstrual phase and women's wellness.

achievements.title: Total App Downloads
achievements.description: Combined downloads across published apps and games.

achievements.title: Live & Maintained
achievements.description: Apps published and actively maintained on the Play Store and App Store.

achievements.title: Employee of the Month
achievements.description: Recognized for consistent delivery, code quality, and reliability on the team.

points: Developed responsive, cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter, ensuring a seamless experience across iOS and Android devices and published them on the Play Store and App Store.
Implemented state management and integrated third-party APIs to enhance app functionality.
Applied object-oriented programming principles to ensure maintainable and scalable code.
Built and optimized UI components for smooth performance, adhering to design guidelines and focusing on intuitive user experience.
Implemented cost-effective applications, incorporating animations and visual effects.
Designed intuitive UI/UX tailored for children, ensuring easy navigation and interaction.
Created attractive kids' games like Kids Campus with lots of fun mini games.
Took applications from scratch to publishing on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store, with constant updates over time.

testimonials.name: Ajay Mistry
testimonials.quote: A wonderful app for kids learning their Math. The sounds are amazing, the Gameplay learning is delightful.

testimonials.name: Vasant Suthar
testimonials.quote: A genuinely great learning app for kids. It covers letters, animals, and sounds in a way that makes learning feel like play, not work.

testimonials.name: Juhi Mewada
testimonials.quote: Great ABCD learning app for my kid — simple, colorful, and easy for a young child to pick up on their own.

testimonials.name: Scary Diaries
testimonials.quote: The game is awesome — smooth gameplay and genuinely fun to come back to.

testimonials.name: Keya Patel
testimonials.quote: Amazing! One of those small games that's way more addictive than it has any right to be.
